{{< block "grid-1" >}}
{{< column "mt-2 pt-1">}}


# bin_intigua_driver64.sys ![:inline](/images/twitter_verified.png)  ![:inline](/images/elmo.gif) 

### Description

bin_intigua_driver64.sys is a vulnerable kernel driver from the KeServiceDescriptorTable/vulnerable-drivers repository. The driver exposes dangerous kernel primitives to usermode.
- **UUID**: 68810b7a-06c5-498a-bbdf-28fb4d5d9201
- **Created**: 2026-04-17
- **Author**: Michael Haag
- **Acknowledgement**:  | [@rainbowdynamix, @DbgPrint](https://twitter.com/@rainbowdynamix, @DbgPrint)

{{< button "https://github.com/magicsword-io/LOLDrivers/raw/main/drivers/0146c74cb125b188dbac4f9fa8ab867e.bin" "Download" >}}
{{< tip "warning" >}}
This download link contains the vulnerable driver!

{{< /tip >}}

{{< blockbanner "bin_intigua_driver64.sys" >}}
### Commands

```
sc.exe create bin_intigua_driver64 binPath=C:\windows\temp\bin_intigua_driver64.sys type=kernel &amp;&amp; sc.exe start bin_intigua_driver64
```


| Use Case | Privileges | Operating System | 
|:---- | ---- | ---- |
| Elevate privileges | kernel | Windows 10 |

{{< column >}}
